Declaring assetmapper.Options emits a source/compiled switch with module-root-relative
source paths and binds consumers through assetmapper.Server.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
)

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS

//fabrik:config assets
type AssetsConfig = assetmapper.Options
-- web/assets/app.css --
body {}
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html><head><link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ asset "app.css" }}"></head>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}<h1>home</h1>{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Assets    assetmapper.Server
	Templates *templates.Set
}

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func (h *Handlers) Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"

	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Config
		fabrikEnv := os.Getenv("FABRIK_ENV")
		switch fabrikEnv {
		case "development", "production":
		default:
			if fabrikEnv == "" {
				return fmt.Errorf("FABRIK_ENV is required: development or production")
			}
			return fmt.Errorf("invalid FABRIK_ENV %q: want development or production", fabrikEnv)
		}
		fabrikConfigOpts := []config.Option{
			config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
			config.File("config." + fabrikEnv + ".yaml"),
		}
		if fabrikEnv == "development" {
			fabrikConfigOpts = append(fabrikConfigOpts, config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"))
		}
		assetmapperOptions, err := config.Load[assetmapper.Options](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
			config.KnownSections("assets"),
			config.Section("assets"),
		)...)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}

		// Providers
		assetKind, err := assetmapperOptions.Mode()
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		var assetServer assetmapper.Server
		switch assetKind {
		case assetmapper.KindSource:
			assetServer, err = assetmapper.NewSource([]assetmapper.Root{
				{FS: os.DirFS("web/assets")},
			}, nil)
		case assetmapper.KindCompiled:
			assetServer, err = assetmapper.Build([]assetmapper.Root{
				{FS: web.Assets, Dir: "assets"},
			}, nil)
		}
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates", assetServer.FuncMap())
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
			Assets:    assetServer,
			Templates: webTemplates,
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Handle("/assets/", assetServer.Handler())
		r.Method("GET", "/{$}", webHandlers.Home)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
